tasks.subject: Task 1: Move the night flow into the night/ folder
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Relocate the existing night-flow screen to `app/night/new.tsx` and update its single caller, so a `night/` folder can also hold the detail route — with no behavior change.

**Files:**
- Move: `mobile/app/night.tsx` → `mobile/app/night/new.tsx`
- Modify: moved file relative imports (`../` → `../../`)
- Modify: `mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx:178` (→ `/night/new`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- app/night.tsx removed, app/night/new.tsx exists with identical logic
- moved file relative imports fixed to ../../
- index.tsx navigates to /night/new
- just lint && just test pass

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just lint && just test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night/new.tsx", "mobile/app/(tabs)/index.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just lint && just test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["app/night.tsx removed, app/night/new.tsx exists with identical logic", "moved file relative imports fixed to ../../", "index.tsx navigates to /night/new", "just lint && just test pass"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: lib/history.ts — stat summary + month grouping (pure, TDD)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the pure logic that backs the History stat strip and month sections, fully unit-tested with no mocks.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/lib/history.ts`
- Test: `mobile/lib/history.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- historyStats: nights=count, films=distinct tmdbId, loved=0; movie-less night not a film; dup film counts once
- buildHistoryMonths: newest month first, newest night first within, empty->[]
- all tests pass

**Verify:** `cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/history.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/history.ts", "mobile/lib/history.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/history.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["historyStats: nights=count, films=distinct tmdbId, loved=0; movie-less night not a film; dup film counts once", "buildHistoryMonths: newest month first, newest night first within, empty->[]", "all tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: app/night/[id].tsx — night detail screen
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the pushed night-detail screen: editorial header (poster + title), "The pick" spotlight row, and "Who watched" list, loaded via `getNight`.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/app/night/[id].tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- reads id, fetches via getNight in useFocusEffect+AbortController, loading/error/not-found states
- editorial header poster+title+year, no reaction (TODO #40)
- The pick spotlight row with glow avatar + date, fallback when pickerId null
- Who watched attendee list, guests badged, no members fetch
- just check passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night/[id].tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["reads id, fetches via getNight in useFocusEffect+AbortController, loading/error/not-found states", "editorial header poster+title+year, no reaction (TODO #40)", "The pick spotlight row with glow avatar + date, fallback when pickerId null", "Who watched attendee list, guests badged, no members fetch", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: app/(tabs)/history.tsx — History tab UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the History placeholder with the full Spotlight UI — stat strip, month sections, per-night rows — driven by `lib/history.ts`, behind a `// TODO(#39)` seam so the honest empty state shows until the list endpoint lands.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/app/(tabs)/history.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- empty nights -> honest empty state under tab top bar
- non-empty -> 3-cell stat strip (Loved accented) + per-month sections
- row poster+serif title+FirstName·date, pressable -> /night/[id]; no reaction glyph (TODO #40)
- // TODO(#39) seam marks the fetch wiring point
- just check passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/(tabs)/history.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["empty nights -> honest empty state under tab top bar", "non-empty -> 3-cell stat strip (Loved accented) + per-month sections", "row poster+serif title+FirstName·date, pressable -> /night/[id]; no reaction glyph (TODO #40)", "// TODO(#39) seam marks the fetch wiring point", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
